_comment: Catalog of data elements Cortex can access for QBR / decks (path + terms). Terms drive hydrate phrase matching and qbr_mappings target resolution (see resolve_data_summary_target_path). Pendo per-page and per-feature detail rows are intentionally omitted (see sites/top_pages). After regenerating from this script, re-merge any custom hydrate phrases into ``terms`` if needed.

terms: [Pendo] LeanDNA staff visitors excluded from metrics
[Pendo] list of signal strings (not enumerated per-line here)
[Pendo] array of site dicts — keys include sitename, visitors, pages_used, features_used, total_events, total_minutes, last_active
no per-page tables in this catalog
[data_summary] trimmed copy of sites for prompts
[Pendo] ranked page list — omitting per-row catalog
[Pendo] ranked feature list — omitting per-row catalog
[Pendo Kei] top user rows (email, role, queries, is_executive)
[Jira] HELP scope issue count in window
[Jira] HELP operational KPI bundle for support-kpis deck
[SFDC portfolio] expansion KPI rollup on revenue book
[LLM export §3c] SF hierarchy: ultimate parent → parent → account name
[LLM export §3c] Ultimate Parent rollup; falls back to name parenthetical / corporate group when ultimate_parent_name blank
[LLM export §3c] count of entity_accounts (full book, not compaction cap)
[LLM export §3c] full-book ARR rollup by Ultimate Parent, sorted desc
[LLM export §3c] Customer Entity count in group
[LLM export §3c] True when any entity in group has non-churned contract status
[LLM export §3c] sample entity Name values (up to 12)
[LLM export §3c] expansion KPI book copied from portfolio revenue book
[LLM export §3c] portfolio labels with comprehensive fetch attempted

[CSR site row] keys may include: factory health_score clear_to_build_pct clear_to_commit_pct component_availability_pct component_availability_projected_pct shortages critical_shortages weekly_active_buyers_pct buyer_mapping_quality high_risk_items site entity
[CSR site row] keys may include: factory on_hand_value on_order_value excess_on_hand doi_days days_coverage turns_of_inventory late_pos late_prs site entity
[CSR site row] keys may include: factory savings_current_period open_ia_value recs_created_30d pos_placed_30d overdue_tasks current_fy_spend previous_fy_spend site entity
[LeanDNA Data API] item master enrichment blob
[LeanDNA Data API] lean projects + savings enrichment
[portfolio row] keys include customer pendo_csm engagement benchmarks signals active_users total_users login_pct depth kei guides exports
[GitHub] blob when present on report — structure varies by wiring
[report] GitHub engineering output rollup (commits, PRs, lines) for productivity joins
[report] per-canonical-email GitHub output in the lookback window
[report] engineer-scoped GitHub totals for the lookback window
[report] slide takeaway strings for GitHub output slides
[report] canonical engineer email map for GitHub ↔ Cursor joins
[report] Cursor token spend correlated with GitHub output (company + individual)
[report] merged ISO-week Cursor tokens vs GitHub commits
[report] slide takeaway strings for AI productivity slides
[report] per-engineer Cursor tokens/spend for dev-* scope
[config/teams.yaml] optional LeanDNA site ids per customer
[config cohorts.yaml] cohort / optional exclude / vertical per customer; Pendo orphans → pendo_orphans.yaml (not nested under report)
[config pendo_orphans.yaml] Pendo sitename prefixes with no SF Customer Entity match, omitted from portfolio rollup (not nested under report)
[report] Cursor Admin API usage / spend rollup for engineering deck slides
[report] Cursor integration loaded for this run
[report] ISO timestamp of Cursor API pull
[report] org-wide seat-included usage cents this billing cycle (sum of includedSpendCents from /teams/spend)
[report] dev-* engineer subset of includedSpendCents this billing cycle
[report] deck-scoped data governance blob for Data Governance slide
[report] ISO timestamp when governance blob was assembled
[report] per-integration pill status for this deck
[report] scope and filter bullets for governance slide
[report] data freshness bullets for governance slide
[report] merged qa and integration warnings for governance slide
[report] system-of-record authority note for governance slide
